blocks.text:
5g What is an ecosystem? What is ecological
balance? How is it threatened by globel
warming?

Both the living? and the non-living?
elements of the four realms of the
Earth interact with each other
constantly. The community formed by
the interaction of living organisms
with their physical environment
constitutes an ecosystem.

Each element in an ecosystem has
a vital role to play. Even if one
element is disturbed, it can lead
to ecological imbalance, and if
unchecked, to the eventual collapse
of the [se] ecosystem.
Human activities are increasingly
upsetting this balance. For example,
when we cut down trees, the amount
